Container.Name: x265-butler
Container.Overview:
x265-butler reclaims disk space on unRAID by automatically transcoding video files to HEVC (x265). Scans library shares for non-x265 files, transcodes them in the background using ffmpeg, tracks results in a dashboard, and never re-encodes the same file twice. Lighter-weight than Tdarr / FileFlows / Unmanic.
Recent highlights: Stats + Dashboard / UI Redesign / Encoder-Benchmark with Pareto-Frontier / Encoder-Profile-Editor / Multi-Share / Storage-Analyzer / Auto-Scan-on-Change.
See full release notes: https://github.com/masterjb/x265-butler/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md
[!] Auto-update notice: This template now uses the :latest image tag, which auto-deploys every release including potentially-breaking Major version transitions (v2.x to v3.x). For production stability, edit the Container's Repository field to pin an exact version (e.g. ghcr.io/masterjb/x265-butler:2.16.0). Release notes for every version: https://github.com/masterjb/x265-butler/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md
Live release feed (all versions): https://github.com/masterjb/x265-butler/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md
Container.Description: HEVC transcoding for unRAID — set-and-forget background re-encode of your library shares to x265. Dashboard, encoder benchmarks, profile editor, auto-scan, multi-share. Full changelog: https://github.com/masterjb/x265-butler/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: HTTP port for the x265-butler dashboard

Config.Name: Library
Config.Description: Path containing video files to scan + transcode
